table-293-293.caption: What are the notes of the death events which has substring 'East'?
data: Severe flooding in eastern district caused by levee breach; multiple casualties reported due to rapid water rise.
Skirmish near the eastern border resulted in fatalities from crossfire during territorial dispute escalation.
Fatalities occurred when structural collapse trapped residents in apartment complex on east side of city center.
Multi-vehicle pileup led to three deaths after emergency response was delayed by heavy fog conditions.
Coastal erosion combined with storm surge claimed lives along the eastern shoreline communities.
